checkin.missingPlacePlaceholder: e.g. Building where they were seen
checkin.messagePlaceholder: e.g. I'm fine with my family.
checkin.missingMessagePlaceholder: Details: age, build, clothing, where they were last seen
checkin.phoneNote: 🔒 We never show your phone number publicly.

request.aiLabel: Describe the emergency in your own words
request.aiPlaceholder: e.g. My grandmother is trapped in a building in Barquisimeto and needs oxygen.
request.aiTooShort: Write a bit more so we can analyze it.
request.aiDone: We read your message and filled in the form. Please check the details.
request.aiFailed: We couldn't analyze it automatically. Please fill in the form manually.
request.placeLabel: Name of the place or building
request.descriptionPlaceholder: What do you need? How many people?
request.successMessage: Your request is now on the help map. Share it so more people see it.
request.successShare: 🆘 There's a help request on Venezuela Ayuda. Check the map:

offer.detailsPlaceholder: e.g. I have a truck and can move people or carry supplies.
offer.successMessage: Your offer is now on the map for those who need it.
offer.successShare: 🙌 I'm offering help on Venezuela Ayuda. Join in:

damaged.placeLabel: Name of the building or place
damaged.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Large cracks in the columns on the 3rd floor

photo.processError: We couldn't process that image. Try another photo.
photo.note: Helps identify the person. The photo will be public in the report.

location.required: Required: tap the map or use your location.
location.dragHint: Move the map to place the pin on your location.
location.searchNotFound: We couldn't find that place. Try another address.
location.geoFailed: We couldn't get your location. You can pick it on the map.
